failed_attempts:
classical
  -- `wignerMatrixMap` is definitionally `wignerMatrixMap'`, and `Matrix.of` is measurable
  -- since all coordinate maps are measurable.
  simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap'] using
    (measurable_of fun i j => by
      -- measurability of each entry follows by cases on `i=j` and `i<j`, each time a coordinate projection
      -- (hence measurable) composed with `if`-expressions.
      by_cases h_eq : i = j
      · simp [wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h_eq]
      · by_cases h_lt : i < j
        · simp [wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h_eq, h_lt]
        · have h_gt : j < i := by
            apply lt_of_le_of_ne
            · exact le_of_not_gt h_lt
            · simpa [eq_comm] using h_eq
          simp [wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h_eq, h_lt, h_gt])

simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap'] using
    (Matrix.measurable_of (f := wignerMatrixEntryFunction) : Measurable (wignerMatrixMap' (n := n)))

simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap'] using
    (Matrix.measurable_of fun i j => (measurable_pi_apply (⟨(i, j), le_rfl⟩ : Index n))).comp
      (measurable_of_discrete _)

classical
  -- `wignerMatrixMap n` is definitionaly `wignerMatrixMap'`, and measurability of matrices reduces
  -- to measurability of all entries.
  ext i j
  simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]

classical
  -- `wignerMatrixMap n` is definitionaly the `Matrix.of` map applied to the coordinate functions
  -- of `wignerMatrixEntryFunction`.
  simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', Matrix.of, wignerMatrixEntryFunction]

classical
  simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap'] using
    (measurable_of _ (by
      intro i j
      simp [wignerMatrixEntryFunction]))

dsimp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap']
  simpa [Matrix.of] using
    (measurable_pi_lambda (fun i : Fin n =>
      measurable_pi_lambda (fun j : Fin n =>
        (measurable_of_discrete _).comp measurable_pi_apply))

simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap'] using
    (Matrix.measurable_of _ (fun i j => measurable_pi_apply _))
